CVE-2019-11023.title: The agroot() function in cgraph\obj.c in libcgraph.a in Graphviz  ...
CVE-2019-11023.description: The agroot() function in cgraph\obj.c in libcgraph.a in Graphviz 2.39.20160612.1140 has a NULL pointer dereference, as demonstrated by graphml2gv.

CVE-2019-9904.title: An issue was discovered in lib\cdt\dttree.c in libcdt.a in graphv ...
CVE-2019-9904.description: An issue was discovered in lib\cdt\dttree.c in libcdt.a in graphviz 2.40.1. Stack consumption occurs because of recursive agclose calls in lib\cgraph\graph.c in libcgraph.a, related to agfstsubg in lib\cgraph\subg.c.
